summary: Sleep #5 — multi-review skill productized. Built /multi-review (router + 4 niche specialists + coordinator) from web research (Cloudflare, HAMY, Qodo) + dreamcontext's existing conventions. 8 new files: skills/multi-review/SKILL.md + REVIEWER_SHARED.md, and 6 agents (review-router/security/cloud-functions/frontend/edge-cases/coordinator). Cross-refs added to AGENTS.md sub-agent table and the two existing reviewer-pattern knowledge files. Opened v0.5.0 planning version (active) — multi-review is its anchor work. New knowledge file: multi-reviewer-pattern.md. New feature PRD: multi-review-skill.md. Retro-task created at in_review awaiting user verification on a real diff. 2 changelog entries. memory.md +1 entry (47 lines, well under cap). All 6 agents pass feedback_agent_skills_declaration rule (skills frontmatter + Skills always loaded body). Skill-aware specialists are the dreamcontext-native angle vs Cloudflare/HAMY hardcoded prompts.

Sleep #4 — cross-repo audit pass. 5 parallel cluster agents synced all stale references after today's memory recall + CHANGELOG schema + tiered snapshot + default-on hook + 150-line cap changes. Updated: skill/SKILL.md (1 fix), agents/dreamcontext-{explore,initializer}.md (5 edits), all 5 .codex/agents/prompts/*.md + corresponding .toml mirrors (full rewrite), src/templates/{CLAUDE.md,AGENTS.md,init/2.memory.md} (new-project scaffolds aligned), README+DEEP-DIVE+AGENTS+CHANGELOG.md (root), memory-recall-bm25 PRD (heavy update with new schema/tiering/CHANGELOG corpus ACs), context-snapshot PRD (Sleep State + Pinned Knowledge change), sleep-consolidation PRD (150-line cap). Final grep clean. Build green 555.12 KB. Memory.md unchanged (43 lines, well under 150). Snapshot 353 lines (down from ~700 baseline, ~50% reduction). Corpus 130 docs (CHANGELOG indexing added 82 entries).

Sleep #4 — 4 sessions consolidated. (1) Brain page 3D view toggle shipped: react-force-graph-3d + three lazy-loaded (~334KB gzip on-demand chunk), 2D/3D segmented control, billboard sprite labels, scene fog for depth (near=900, far=4200 after blackness fix), click-to-fit-subtree camera (zoomToFit with neighbor filter). (2) Mermaid render bug fix across MarkdownPreview/TaskDetailPanel — shared useMermaidRender hook, removed prefers-color-scheme drift, Playwright-verified. (3) Dashboard 'Apple Gallery Wall' design system rewrite (v04-ws4) + saved graph views feature with localStorage persistence. (4) Strategic deferral: link-aware BM25 boost (~2h) vs embedding overlay (~1day) — both deferred pending gold-set of BM25 misses; new knowledge file decision-link-aware-vs-embedding-recall.md captures the call. Core: 4.tech_stack gained dashboard deps + mermaid/marked/panzoom backfill; 6.system_flow updated for snapshot Sleep-State removal + pinned-callout change; 2.memory got 3 LIFO entries. Legacy 5.data_structures.sql migrated to data-structures/default.md. Features: web-dashboard.md absorbed Brain 3D as a sub-capability (PRD section, 7 acceptance criteria all ticked); sleep-fanout-architecture confirmed stable; project-initialization verified current. Tasks: brain-3d-view + mermaid-render-fix + snapshot-changelog-refactor bodies fully reconciled with workflow mermaid + full PRD sections, all in_review. v0.4.0: 6/6 formally tagged tasks in_review — release-ready pending user browser verification. Needs user attention: (a) browser verify Brain 3D in dev server, (b) confirm saved-views in Brave Incognito, (c) Phase 2/3 direction on snapshot-changelog-refactor (CHANGELOG schema + memory.md rename).

Sleep #3 — memory recall (BM25, Path A) shipped; mem0 explicitly rejected after 3-reviewer adversarial review (critic/pragmatist/security all rejected). New CLI namespace: dreamcontext memory recall/remember/update/delete/list/status. Zero new deps. 20-query benchmark on 44-doc corpus: 94.7% top-1, 100% top-5. PRD memory-recall-bm25.md (in_review). UserPromptSubmit hook extended opt-in via DREAMCONTEXT_MEMORY_HOOK=1. Docs propagated: SKILL.md, dreamcontext-explore/initializer agents, 3 sleep agents, README, DEEP-DIVE, AGENTS. 2 new knowledge files: decision-mem0-vs-bm25-recall, three-reviewer-parallel-mandates-pattern. CHANGELOG entries for feat(memory) + docs(memory). 4.tech_stack updated to mention BM25 + recall.ts. 6.system_flow updated with query-time recall in ACTIVE WORK section.

WS-1 manifest install/update, WS-2 sleep gate split + multi-product + SessionStart product injection, WS-4 dashboard race fixes + flowchart sync + Linear Midnight design overhaul. 3 v0.4 tasks (in_review) attached v0.4.0. Backlog hygiene flagged ecc-inspired-roadmap stale 82 days. Update run on this repo: manifest bootstrapped, 4 stale brand-voice agents deleted.
